summary: Verified PDF download fix on /catalogue. Backend proxy endpoint /api/proxy-image returns image bytes with correct content-type. Manual click on Download PDF button generates and downloads a valid ~1.3MB PDF with correct filename prefix, button label toggles to 'GENERATING…' during work, and no CORS/tainted canvas errors. Auto-download via /catalogue?print=1 also triggers a download of the same PDF automatically after data loads.
passed: /catalogue loads with cover page (logo, brand, contact block) rendered
10/16 images loaded via /api/proxy-image (product cards use proxy)
Click catalogue-print-btn triggers a real file download; filename Samrat-Glass-Emporium-Catalogue-2026-07-02.pdf, size 1,306,868 bytes (>10KB)
Button label switches to 'GENERATING…' while html2pdf runs
Zero CORS / tainted-canvas errors in console during PDF generation
Auto-download flow: /catalogue?print=1 automatically initiates the PDF download (no manual click needed)

failed.issue: A few individual /api/proxy-image requests returned 404 in console (e.g. photo-1543198126-a4b52a3a8bda). Non-blocking – core download flow and other images work; likely upstream Unsplash returning 404 for a specific photo id.
failed.evidence: Console: 'Failed to load resource: 404' x4 and 'Error loading image .../api/proxy-image?url=...photo-1543198126-a4b52a3a8bda'

action_items: Optional: swap or remove the specific Unsplash photo id photo-1543198126-a4b52a3a8bda that 404s upstream; not required for the fix to be considered working.
